title: rpl/routing: rebuild_routes() is O(N * depth) per DAO
description: In routing.rs:340-347, every incoming DAO triggers a full rebuild of all routes. assemble_path() walks up to MAX_CHAIN (64) hops per target. For N targets, this is O(N * depth) per DAO. Consider incremental updates: only rebuild routes that include the newly-announced target or its ancestors. Add comment noting the quadratic worst-case.
close_reason: Acceptable for typical mesh sizes (<50 nodes). Incremental updates would require dependency tracking - significant complexity for marginal gain.
